name: every SLSA rule in the pre-authored industry-self-regulatory namespace cites the authoritative slsa.dev URL from the C-13 registry
command: grep -c 'docs_url: https://slsa.dev/' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/industry-self-regulatory/slsa.yaml" | awk '$1 >= 3 { exit 0 } { exit 1 }' && echo slsa-cites-slsa-dev 1>&2
